approval.note: Use an isolated Commonworld worktree. Before every nontrivial merge require complete published diff, head/tree/diff-bound self-review, green CI, review resolution and exact live Pages readback.

title: Prove physical screen-reader product usability
goal: After geographic discovery stabilizes, test and repair the complete public task flow with physical assistive technologies.

acceptance.assertion: Physical VoiceOver task evidence covers discovery, search, selection, focus and return.
Physical TalkBack task evidence covers the same bounded flow.
A desktop screen-reader and keyboard flow is checked.
Search, map, selection and degraded states have understandable announcements.
No WCAG or screen-reader product-support claim exceeds the collected evidence.
